items.title: Near City Center
items.text: Conveniently located at Komuny Paryskiej 45, just 10 minutes walk from the Old Town. Easy to reach for lunch, dinner, or a coffee break.

items.title: Fresh Ingredients
items.text: Traditional Indian spices imported directly from India, combined with the freshest local produce. Every dish is prepared daily with authentic recipes.

items.title: Multiple Service Options
items.text: Enjoy our food your way - in our cozy restaurant, order for takeaway, or have it delivered straight to your door through popular delivery platforms.

items.title: Vegetarian & Vegan Options
items.text: Extensive plant-based menu featuring traditional Indian vegetarian dishes. All dietary preferences are welcome with clearly marked options.

items.title: Unique Regional Specialties
items.text: Discover authentic Indian street food and regional dishes you won't find elsewhere in Wrocław. From tandoori to aromatic curries and fresh naan.
